Privacy.name: Disable Telemetry
Privacy.desc: Stops Windows from sending diagnostic & usage data to Microsoft. Stops the DiagTrack service.

Privacy.name: Disable Advertising ID
Privacy.desc: Stops apps from using your advertising ID to track you for personalized ads.

Privacy.name: Disable Activity History
Privacy.desc: Stops Windows recording your activity timeline (apps opened, files used).

Privacy.name: Disable Location Tracking
Privacy.desc: Turns off Windows location services system-wide.

Privacy.name: Disable Feedback Requests
Privacy.desc: Stops Windows from asking you for feedback periodically.

UI / Appearance.name: Enable Dark Mode
UI / Appearance.desc: Sets Apps and System to dark theme.

UI / Appearance.name: Show File Extensions
UI / Appearance.desc: Always show .txt .exe .png etc on filenames in Explorer.

UI / Appearance.name: Show Hidden Files
UI / Appearance.desc: Reveal files marked as hidden in Explorer.

UI / Appearance.name: Classic Right-Click Menu (Win11)
UI / Appearance.desc: Removes Win11's 'Show more options' submenu - all options visible like Win10.

UI / Appearance.name: Align Taskbar Left
UI / Appearance.desc: Move Start button and taskbar icons to left side (Win10 style).

UI / Appearance.name: Disable Transparency
UI / Appearance.desc: Turn off Acrylic/Mica blur effects. Slight performance gain on low-end PCs.

UI / Appearance.name: Disable Taskbar Animations
UI / Appearance.desc: Removes smooth animations on taskbar. Snappier feel on slow hardware.

Search / Cortana.name: Disable Cortana
Search / Cortana.desc: Disables Cortana voice assistant completely via group policy.

Search / Cortana.name: Disable Bing Search in Start
Search / Cortana.desc: Stops Start Menu from sending your searches to Bing.

Search / Cortana.name: Disable Web Search Suggestions
Search / Cortana.desc: Removes web suggestions from search results.

Performance.name: Visual Effects: Best Performance
Performance.desc: Disables animations, shadows, smoothing. Big speedup on slow PCs (uglier look).

Performance.name: Disable Mouse Acceleration
Performance.desc: Raw 1:1 mouse movement. Essential for FPS gaming. Standard everyday use is fine without it.

Performance.name: Disable Xbox Game Bar
Performance.desc: Stops Win+G overlay. Reduces background processes. May break some games' Game Mode.

Performance.name: GPU Hardware Scheduling On
Performance.desc: Reduces input latency on supported GPUs. Requires reboot. May cause instability on some drivers.

Performance.name: Disable Fast Startup
Performance.desc: Forces a real cold boot every shutdown. Slower shutdown/boot BUT fixes weird driver/network issues.

Updates.name: Block Update Auto-Restart
Updates.desc: Windows won't reboot for updates while you're logged in. Reduces interruptions.

Explorer.name: Explorer: Open to This PC
Explorer.desc: File Explorer opens to This PC instead of Quick Access by default.

Explorer.name: Hide Recent Files
Explorer.desc: Remove the Recent / Frequent sections from Quick Access for privacy.

Network.name: Enable Network Discovery
Network.desc: Lets your PC see other devices on the LAN (file shares, printers etc).

Network.name: Disable IPv6
Network.desc: Some networks/apps have IPv6 issues - disabling forces IPv4. Reboot needed.

Apps.name: Disable Edge Startup Boost
Apps.desc: Stops Edge from preloading in background at boot.

Power.name: Add Ultimate Performance Plan
Power.desc: Adds the hidden 'Ultimate Performance' power plan (best for desktops, ignores power saving).

Power.name: Disable Hibernate
Power.desc: Removes hiberfil.sys (can free 5-20GB on C:). Disables Fast Startup too.

Safety.name: Disable Sticky Keys Popup
Safety.desc: Stops the annoying popup when you press Shift 5 times.
